heading: Governing body
label: 170305 Governing body
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)170305(a)36:3606., , §§ 5 (words after 1st comma related to discrimination in holding office), 6, 7, .Oct. 7, 1985Pub. L. 99–11999 Stat. 499170305(b)36:3607.170305(c)36:3605 (words after 1st comma related to discrimination in holding office).In subsections (a) and (b), the words “and in conformity with the laws of the State in which it is incorporated” are omitted as unnecessary.In subsection (a), the words “composition of” are omitted as unnecessary.In subsection (b), the words “positions of” are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Board of Directors
children.label: a .—Board of Directors
children.text: The board of directors and the responsibilities of the board are as provided in the articles of incorporation.

children.heading: .—Officers
children.label: b .—Officers
children.text: The officers and the election of officers are as provided in the articles of incorporation.

children.heading: .—Nondiscrimination
children.label: c .—Nondiscrimination
children.text: The requirements for holding office in the corporation may not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, or national origin.
